input: An AI tool offering judicial assistance for legal interpretation tasks: it helps a judicial decision support workflow by retrieving and applying relevant case law.

expected.notes: Annex III.8(a) — administration of justice (researching and interpreting facts and law, applying the law to a concrete set of facts). Lexicon hits on 'judicial assistance', 'legal interpretation', 'judicial decision'. EUR-Lex Annex III paragraph 8(a).
